title: Spanish-Style Paella
description: A classic Spanish dish made with saffron-infused oil, flavorful rice, and savory paella rice. Serve hot and enjoy!

ingredients.name: Paella Rice
ingredients.notes: Short-grain rice is ideal for paella

ingredients.name: Spanish Onion
ingredients.notes: Thinly slice the onion for best results

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Mince the garlic for added flavor

ingredients.name: Red Bell Pepper
ingredients.notes: Dice the pepper for a pop of color

ingredients.name: Tomato
ingredients.notes: Dice the tomato for added moisture

ingredients.name: Smoked Paprika
ingredients.notes: Add a smoky depth to the dish

instructions: Heat the saffron-infused oil in a large paella pan over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the diced red bell pepper and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the diced tomato and cook until the mixture is heated through.
Add the flavorful rice and paella rice to the pan, stirring to combine.
Add the smoked paprika and stir to combine.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly, until the rice is coated in the oil and the mixture is heated through.
Transfer the pan to the oven and cook at 400°F (200°C) for 20-25 minutes, or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Remove the pan from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
